_source: nfa0 = China net IIP / nominal GDP, end-2025. REAL data: SAFE (State Administration of Foreign Exchange) 'China's International Investment Position as at the End of 2025' — net external assets USD 4,071.3 billion; NBS official 2025 nominal GDP 140.1879 trillion yuan = USD 20.01 trillion (gov.cn, implied CNY/USD 7.006). 4071.3 / 20010 = +20.35% of GDP. Cross-check: BoFiT end-June 2025 implied ~20% of GDP. China is a net creditor. UNIT FACTORS (units.*): fxToUsd=6.7686 is the REAL CNY/USD spot rate, FRED DEXCHUS latest non-missing observation 2026-06-18 (api.stlouisfed.org/fred, series DEXCHUS); NOT synthetic.
_flags: CA ANCHORED to sourced caAnchor; primary income folded into it (iNFA=0); FX-valuation channel off (fxShare=0) pending per-bloc signed exposure. NFA rolled from real nfa0 by the BoP identity with growth dilution. Trade DEVIATIONS from the model (real net-export ratio) — a flagged terms-of-trade approximation.
_unit_factors_note: Shipped units: gdpKind=realIndexDeflate (GDP_CN is a REAL chain-linked volume index), usdBase=158760958.8679 (reflates exp(gdp/100)*exp(deflator/100) to nominal USD), tradeFreqMult=3 (EXP/IMP_CN are monthly-average USD flows -> quarterly). The recursion reads ONLY these three fields. (Supersedes the earlier gdpScale/fxToUsd nominalLocal parametrization.)
_caSource: IMF WEO BCA_NGDPD current account % of GDP (CN)
_smell: anchored CA sane: drift 2.7pp, max jump 0.2pp/q
